rationale: Trading apps demand supreme data legibility and an elite, command-center aesthetic. We eliminate decorative fluff in favor of pure data visualization, stark contrast (Pure White against Deep Obsidian), and highly functional Profit (Neon Green) / Loss (Vivid Red) indicators.

numbers.rationale: Use Reanimated for rolling/morphing P&L counters to simulate live high-frequency trading data.

Splash.layout: Centered logo over abstract trading background.
Splash.instructions: Use 'splash_bg' image from media URLs behind a dark gradient overlay (black/70 to black/30). Central logo pulses, followed by a bottom-up sweep revealing 'IndexPilot AI' using Manrope H1.

Auth.instructions: For Login and Registration: Use completely solid background (#050505). Headings left-aligned. Inputs should feel technical (1px border, stark). Main CTA is pure white. Add 'data-testid' to all inputs and buttons.

PIN.instructions: Setup and Lock screens. 4 distinct circular slots for the PIN indicator. Numeric keypad should have no borders, large typography, generously spaced. Use Haptic feedback (Impact) on every keystroke.

Dashboard_Home.layout: Control room grid adapted for mobile.
Dashboard_Home.instructions: Top section: Wallet Card and Today's P&L (massive JetBrains Mono metric). Market status indicator (OPEN - glowing green dot). Active positions list below. Implement pull-to-refresh with a custom haptic spinner.

Dashboard_Symbols.layout: Dense data list with sticky header filters.
Dashboard_Symbols.instructions: Search bar at top. Horizontal scrollable filter chips (NIFTY, BANKNIFTY, SENSEX). List items must show symbol, live price, and Auto-trade toggle. Settings gear per symbol for Qty/Target/SL.

Dashboard_Broker.instructions: 3 sub-tabs (Connection, Static IP, Request). Use glassmorphic segmented controller. Connection tab shows Dhan logo (use generic tech logo) with API key inputs.

Dashboard_Journal.instructions: If empty, show 'empty_journal' image in center. If populated, show date headers with a vertical connecting line on the left. CSV export button fixed at bottom right.

Dashboard_Strategies.instructions: Show AI Signal generator. Use 'ai_signal_hero' visual. Signal cards should have glowing borders based on strength. Action buttons for 'Monitor Position AI'.

Dashboard_Support_Logs.instructions: Support: Standard chat thread interface. Logs: Use JetBrains Mono for a pure terminal feel. Green for info, red for errors, tiny font size (10px or 12px) for density.

splash_bg.description: Abstract pink and green glow data lines, for splash screen background under dark overlay.

ai_signal_hero.description: Neon blue line chart for the Strategies AI tab header.

empty_journal.description: Minimalist desk layout with notebook, for Journal empty state.

broker_logo_dhan_placeholder.description: Minimalist tech logo for Broker connection screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo application. Use React Native StyleSheet or NativeWind/Tailwind depending on your stack. The design tokens provided should map directly to your theme file.
Do not use `div`, `span`, or Shadcn web components. Use `View`, `Text`, `TouchableOpacity`, `TextInput` from React Native or equivalent UI libraries.
Strictly adhere to the dark theme and Archetype 4 rules. Do not use 'SaaS Blue'. Stick to Pure White, Deep Obsidian, and Neon Green/Red for trading indicators.
Implement production-grade animations using `react-native-reanimated`. Pay special attention to rolling numbers for P&L.
All media assets must be fetched directly from the `media_urls` provided. DO NOT use placeholder text or mock image services.
Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements as defined in the screen testIds arrays.
Maintain high density on the Dashboard screens, resembling a 'control room' grid for mobile.
Use Manrope for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body, and JetBrains Mono exclusively for numerical data/metrics to give a technical terminal look.
